# Performance MAX Agency
> Local business marketing agency specializing in Google Ads, SEO, Local SEO, and the integrated "Near Me" Package.

## About
Performance MAX Agency helps local businesses get found online. We combine Google Ads, SEO, and Local SEO into one integrated strategy called the "Near Me" Package. With 950+ accounts managed, $23M+ in ad spend, and 18+ years of experience, we are a trusted authority in local business digital marketing.

## Contact
- Phone: +1 (404) 716-5444
- Email: info@performancemaxagency.com
- Website: https://performancemaxagency.com

## Locations
- Headquarters: 1804 Calibre Creek Pkwy, Roswell, GA 30076
- Ohio Office: 3592 Ingleside Rd, Shaker Heights, OH

## Services
- Google Ads Management: Search, display, and Performance Max campaigns for local businesses
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO): Technical audits, content strategy, on-page optimization
- Local SEO: Google Business Profile optimization, citation building, review management
- Social Media Marketing: Content creation, community management, paid social
- Lead Generation: Multi-channel funnels, landing pages, CRM integration
- Near Me Package: Integrated Google Ads + SEO + Local SEO strategy

## Certifications
- SAM Registered (System for Award Management)
- BBB Accredited (Better Business Bureau)
- Google Ads Partner
- Meta Ads Certified
- LinkedIn Ads Certified
- Semrush Certified
